description_long: This ottoman features an ornate, rectangular body with elaborately carved floral and leaf motifs on all visible sides, giving it a classical, antique appearance. The surface is finished in a silvery-gray tone with darker accents that highlight the intricate relief patterns. The top is flat and decorated with a central floral design, suggesting both decorative and functional use. The legs are short, outward-curving, and also adorned with carved details, providing a stable base and enhancing the overall elegance. The object appears to be made primarily of wood or a wood-like material, possibly with a metallic or painted finish to achieve its silvery look. Its robust construction and decorative style make it suitable for upscale urban environments such as parks, plazas, or luxury residential areas.
description: A rectangular, ornately carved ottoman with floral motifs and a silvery-gray finish, featuring a flat decorated top and short, curved legs.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main floral relief and the full width of the ottoman, highlighting the detailed carvings and curved legs.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the depth of the ottoman and the continuation of the floral motif, with the legs and side carvings clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying similar ornate floral carvings and the same leg design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the side floral relief and the profile of the legs.
